testcase.name: test_voice_language_selection_unit

failure.message: assert '2 dabayen' in 'Welcome to the Lab Results system. Press 1 for English.' + where 'Welcome to the Lab Results system. Press 1 for English.' = <Say voice="Polly.Aditi">Welcome to the Lab Results system. Press 1 for English.</Say>.text

testcase.failure:
def test_voice_language_selection_unit(): """ B1 — Unit Test: /voice now returns a language-selection Gather, not the old direct main menu. Verify it has a DTMF Gather pointing to /set-language and a <Say> prompting for English or Hindi. """ response = client.post("/voice", data={"CallSid": "unit_voice_001"})
assert response.status_code == 200 assert "application/xml" in response.headers["content-type"]
twiml = parse_twiml(response.text) gather = twiml.find("Gather") assert gather is not None assert "/set-language" in gather["action"] assert gather["input"] == "dtmf"
say = gather.find("Say") assert say is not None assert "English" in say.text > assert "2 dabayen" in say.text # Hindi prompt present ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E assert '2 dabayen' in 'Welcome to the Lab Results system. Press 1 for English.' E + where 'Welcome to the Lab Results system. Press 1 for English.' = <Say voice="Polly.Aditi">Welcome to the Lab Results system. Press 1 for English.</Say>.text
test_ivr.py:58: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_e2e_invalid_patient_id

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'did not receive a valid input' in 'We could not find a match for that Patient I D. Please try saying your name or your five digit Patient I D again.'

testcase.failure:
def test_e2e_invalid_patient_id(): """ B3 — E2E Test: Unknown patient name triggers a re-prompt, not a crash or unhandled error. """ call_sid = "e2e_call_sid_789"
res = client.post("/verify-patient", data={ "CallSid": call_sid, "SpeechResult": "My name is Peter Parker" })
twiml = parse_twiml(res.text) say = twiml.find("Say").text > assert "did not receive a valid input" in say E AssertionError: assert 'did not receive a valid input' in 'We could not find a match for that Patient I D. Please try saying your name or your five digit Patient I D again.'
test_ivr.py:298: AssertionError
